scripts.test:package: npm run package && unzip -p dist/agent-bridge-extension.zip config.js | grep -q 'BUILD_ENV = "production"' && for file in quick-insight.js workspace-operation.js workspace.js workspace-controller.js sidepanel.html sidepanel.css sidepanel.js; do unzip -Z1 dist/agent-bridge-extension.zip | grep -qx "$file" || exit 1; done
